summary: Set 085 Session 1 (F1): shipped the declarative preload manifest (guidance.preload in router-config.yaml: per-file token ceilings + total_ceiling_tokens) and the ratcheting CI ceiling gate. Extended guidance_config.py (manifest parsing with int-not-bool guards, preload_declared/malformed-entry tracking, back-compat) and guidance_report.py (per-file + total --check, fail-closed on unbuildable/unconfirmable manifests, repo-root-relative path containment incl. platform-independent absolute + realpath symlink checks, --write-headers stamp:true opt-in, byte-identical legacy --json). Declared this repo's manifest at ratchet-start sizes (total 92,719), added a dedicated ubuntu CI job, a CONTRIBUTING pre-commit line, and documented the ratchet-down-only rule + the preload admission test in guidance-lifecycle.md. New pytest matrix (89 tests). Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4) ran 12 diff-based rounds plus one independent Set-084 close-backstop round; each caught a real, distinct fail-closed/path-containment/contract defect (config fail-open, --json back-compat, malformed preload/guidance blocks, misplaced top-level preload, non-root-relative + symlink paths, cross-platform absolute detection, silently-dropped malformed entries, --repo-root config source, and the close-backstop's --write-headers stamp:false opt-in violation + its dual-ceiling stamping consequence), all fixed; round 12 VERIFIED. Full suite 2812 passed, 5 skipped. Adjudication of the extended loop (edge-case exhaustion, L-071-1) recorded in s1-conventions.md.

reason.specifics: Routed analysis recommends a large-context, high-coherence Claude/Anthropic orchestrator at high effort for Session 2 (F2+F3): authoring session-constitution.md and rewriting the required-reading contract across many cross-cutting surfaces is authoring-heavy with a wide stale-echo blast radius; operator supervision on the cross-cutting rewrite and the required path-aware critique apply.
